item.title: CodeReview AI — AI-powered code review for your team
item.description: Evaluate your team's code quality with AI. Built with Python and FastAPI. An alternative to existing review tools.

item.title: DesignFlow — Figma plugin for design systems
item.description: Create and manage design systems in Figma.

item.title: ScaleDB — Database scaling made simple
item.description: Scale your postgres database effortlessly. Growing fast with kubernetes support.
